title: A star-like orange UFO spotted in Curitiba [2000]
excerpt: JAN 23rd, 2000. Time: 12:14 pm. Duration: 15 minutes. text_preview: JAN 23rd, 2000. Time: 12:14 pm. Duration: 15 minutes. In the town of Rebouças, Curitiba, State of Paraná, two witnesses spotted an unidentified flying object shaped like a “dot” and colored “orange”. The reported UFO had the appearance of a “star”, alternating movements and stops. According to the witnesses, the sky was partially cloudy and the object, at the end of its appearance, went to the West. For the COMDABRA’s report [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] the observer of the phenomenon further stated that: “The light disappeared between the clouds while standing still and then reappeare
summary: Two witnesses in Rebouças, Curitiba saw a star-like orange dot UFO alternating movement and stops for 15 minutes before it drifted west into clouds.
